items.title: Climate Knowledge Dataset
items.short_description: Curated climate-science chunks for GAIA retrieval, education, and public source trails.
items.maintainer_note: Use for source-traceable climate education and retrieval. Keep row counts and source families aligned with the Hugging Face card and climate-dataset status notes.
known_limits: Derived chunks are not a substitute for reading original source documents.
Retrieval quality depends on chunking, source balance, and query phrasing.
Some source families carry their own licenses and attribution requirements.
intended_use: Ground GAIA answers in inspectable climate source families.
Support public education, source discovery, and review workflows.
items.gaia_prompt_hint: When using this dataset, point users to the source family, the Hugging Face record, and any uncertainty or retrieval limitation before treating an answer as decision-grade.

items.title: Carbon Projects Unified
items.short_description: Normalized registry and project records for comparison and carbon-project audit workflows.
items.maintainer_note: Use as an audit working set. Registry records may be incomplete, stale, duplicated, or revised upstream.
known_limits: Processed records depend on upstream registry availability and field consistency.
Normalization does not verify project climate impact.
Project inclusion does not imply endorsement.
intended_use: Support transparent audit, deduplication, and review workflows.
items.gaia_prompt_hint: When discussing carbon projects, describe this as a review-stage processed dataset and remind users that registry metadata is not proof of field performance.

items.title: Earth Love United Carbon Projects
items.short_description: Foundation-facing carbon-project release layer for public review, partner discussion, and future validation.
items.maintainer_note: Use as an experimental public release layer. Field validation and independent review remain future work.
known_limits: Experimental status means records may change as review methods improve.
Not all records have independent field verification.
Do not present as certified restoration impact.
intended_use: Invite public review and partner questions.
Track candidate audit records and future validation needs.
not_for: Procurement decisions without independent due diligence
items.gaia_prompt_hint: When using this entry, state that it is experimental and should not be described as verified field truth.

items.title: Runtime Globe Data
items.short_description: Small local JSON and CSV files used by the living globe, public journey, and scenario widgets.
items.maintainer_note: Use for public interface context and transparent scenario assumptions. Keep values readable and small enough for static hosting.
known_limits: Runtime files prioritize fast loading and public explanation over full source depth.
Country and event summaries should be audited before policy-grade use.
intended_use: Power the public globe and homepage audit links.
items.gaia_prompt_hint: When pointing to runtime data, explain that these are public interface files and should be cross-checked with source datasets for high-stakes use.

items.title: Provenance Registry
items.short_description: Human-readable source of truth for public dataset cards, readiness labels, and GAIA source guidance.
items.maintainer_note: Update this registry before changing public dataset readiness labels or GAIA source guidance.
known_limits: Registry entries document provenance expectations; they do not validate all upstream scientific claims.
Manual review is still required when source files or external dataset cards change.
intended_use: Back public dataset cards with inspectable metadata.
Give GAIA a consistent source-trail model.
not_for: Replacement for source licenses and dataset cards
items.gaia_prompt_hint: Use this registry as the first stop for ELU dataset readiness, intended use, known limits, and audit routing.
